title: Next-day readiness forecasting code and reproducibility materials in elite women's football
description: Reproducible analysis code, manuscript source, figures, tables, and documentation for a secondary analysis of publicly available SoccerMon subjective-monitoring data. This release refines the analytic cohort to match the 7-day workload history used by the primary model, tunes the complete deployed pipeline with chronological source-team folds, adds calibration curves, and updates missingness and transportability reporting. The original SoccerMon dataset is not redistributed.
